steps.title: Express the given ratio as an equation
steps.content:
The ratio m to k is 1 to 5 means:
$$\frac{m}{k} = \frac{1}{5}$$

steps.title: Substitute the time interval and solve for distance
steps.content:
Given that the time interval is 25 seconds, substitute k = 25:
$$\frac{m}{25} = \frac{1}{5}$$
Multiply both sides by 25:
$$m = 25 \times \frac{1}{5} = 5$$

The person is 5 miles from the lightning flash. That matches choice D — D is correct.
